div1.entryFree:
Comfortless, 1) disconsolate: grim and c. despair, Err. V, 80. the queen is c. H8 II, 3, 105.
2) giving no comfort or help: news fitting to the night, black, fearful, c. John V, 6, 20. that kiss is c. as frozen water to a starved snake, Tit. III, 1, 251. all dark and c. Lr. III, 7, 85.
